chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-697 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.3673/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 03.03.2025 Mr.Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Ghazi Khan Khalil, Zeeshan Ahmed and Aftab Ali, Advocates for the Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Rizwan Memon, Commissioner, CTO, F.B.R. Karachi is present. Mr.Rizwan Memon, Commissioner, CTO, F.B.R. Karachi states that the application available at page-29 would be decided expeditiously vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. He further states that this would be done within a week. In view hereof, petitioner’s counsel states that the petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
